input_text: The bike is small. Probably elephants have no trunks. The cat slept on the velvet sofa. The man standing by the door coughed. The horse kept in the stable was calm. The length of Nile is 10 meters. Earth contains Europe. Sandra travelled to the kitchen. The teacher showed the map to the students. Riga is not in Estonia. The stone was heavy. These links present the many viewpoints that existed. Agatha is in trouble. This book is more interesting than that one. Sandra travelled to the hallway. Sue is a true patriot. The street is in Tallinn. A village road was narrow. A flower was white. Sheep are afraid of mice. Mr Dursley is a catholic. Americans cannot disappear. Apparently, Tom left early. Mary went to the bathroom. The nice Emajogi is 80 kilometers long. If X1 is a father of Y1, Y1 is a child of X1. The guide offered the tourists tea. Clinton defeated Dole. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. The ball was kicked by Mike. The city was destroyed. Sandra moved to the garden. John eats big carrots. Mark is an animal. The letter was written by Eve. A coffee cup broke. Where is Sandra?
